name: Speech Bubble
scaffolding_intent: Displays a pixelated speech bubble above the character, scaffolding dialogue and direct speech using linguistic verbs

parameters.name: bubbleText
parameters.description: Text to display inside the speech bubble

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Size multiplier for the speech bubble

correction_intent: Child attributed incorrect dialogue to a character
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't included dialogue for the characters
